## Summary

Describe the problem and the smallest change that solves it.

## Verification

- [ ] `./tests/static.sh` passes
- [ ] No real IP addresses, usernames, credentials, or private logs are included
- [ ] Network/security behavior changes are documented
- [ ] Backward compatibility and uninstall behavior were considered

## Security impact

Describe changes to trust boundaries, privileges, proxy routing, TLS, SSH, DNS,
or stored configuration. Write `None` when the change has no security impact.
